svg.text: 1) Find payment by idempotencyKey. Existing + mismatched payload -> 409. Existing + matched payload -> return by payment status.
2) Validate client and subscription type. If missing -> 404.
3) Calculate price (5% discount when client subscriptions count > 5), create subscription + processing payment.
4) Call payment service: Accepted -> 201/Paid, Rejected -> 402/Failed, Technical error -> 202/Processing.
